name: saas-template
_cssPipelineNote: UX-01: The app SERVES src/SaasTemplate.Api/wwwroot/css/app.css, a hand-maintained stylesheet linked by Components/App.razor — NOT this Tailwind build output (root style.css / wwwroot/css/site.css are orphans nothing links). build:css was intentionally left pointing at style.css: repointing it to app.css would clobber the hand-written component layer (.sidebar/.login-*/.pricing-*/dashboard) with a utility-only dump and break the app. Dark-mode semantic tokens are authored directly in app.css and mirrored into input.css @theme so the design-token source stays consistent.
